meaning: n.新兵,新分子,新会员vt.使恢复,补充,征募vi.征募新兵,复原
examples: He is hoping to recruit a chairman from outside the company.
The police are trying to recruit more black and Hispanic officers.
The police are trying to recruit more officers from ethnic minorities.
He received a short letter saying the matter would be addressed when he became a recruit.
Perella is still finalizing the details of his new partnership while he continues to recruit.
